final:
// // This module implements an EEPROM with read, write, and erase functionalities. The write input is a 5-bit data, a write disable signal, and a clock signal. The read functionality outputs the stored data when the read disable signal is activated. The erase functionality sets the stored data to a predefined value (e.g., 5'b11111) when an erase signal is activated.
module eeprom_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire read_enable,
    input wire erase,
    input wire [4:0] data_in,
    output reg [4:0] data_out
);
    reg [4:0] stored_data;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (erase) begin
            stored_data <= 5'b00000; // Erase data
        end else if (write_enable) begin
            stored_data <= data_in; // Write data
        end
    end

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (read_enable) begin
            data_out <= stored_data; // Read data
        end
    end
endmodule
